data.title: 国际服参展Anime Expo 2026
data.summary: Sensei, we are back at Anime Expo! Blue Archive is returning to AX 2026 with a booth, panel session,
data.body:
Sensei, we are back at Anime Expo!

Blue Archive is returning to AX 2026 with a booth, panel session, and more ways to celebrate with the community.

Join us in Los Angeles from July 2–5. More details are coming soon!

#BlueArchive #AnimeExpo #AX2026
